title: campe planisiliqua
intro: Campe planisiliqua, also known as the flat-fruited campe, is a plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Campe planisiliqua include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
